security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: https://ipc.localhost

bundle.longDescription: 4-step installer for the Roomler Tunnel client (Win/Linux/macOS). Detects existing installs, downloads the matching CLI archive through roomler.ai's proxy, extracts to a per-user location, adds the binary to PATH, and enrolls the client against the configured Roomler server. No terminal commands required.
